     The Numbers Business Report

The Turning (2020)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $15,472,775Details
International Box Office $2,987,964
Worldwide Box Office $18,460,739
Further financial details...

Synopsis

At a mysterious estate in the Maine countryside, newly appointed nanny Kate is charged with the care of two disturbed orphans, Flora and Miles. Quickly though, she discovers that both the children and the house are harboring dark secrets and things may not be as they appear.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$6,950,045 (44.9% of total gross)
Legs:2.23 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:83.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$12,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.5 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,571 opening theaters/2,571 max. theaters, 3.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $20,158,425

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: January 24th, 2020 (Wide) by Universal
International Releases: January 23rd, 2020 (Wide) (Paraguay)
January 24th, 2020 (Limited) (United Kingdom)
January 24th, 2020 (Wide), released as Presencias del Mal (Mexico)
January 24th, 2020 (Wide) (Ecuador)
January 29th, 2020 (Wide) (Trinidad)
Video Release: April 7th, 2020 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for terror, violence, disturbing images, brief strong language and some suggestive content.
(Rating bulletin 2585 (Cert #52284), 7/3/2019)
Running Time: 94 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: F-Rated
Geographical setting: Maine
Plot point: Haunted House, Nanny, Orphan
Social setting: Supernatural
Source material: Modern Adaptation
Subgenre: Supernatural Horror
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: DreamWorks Pictures, Vertigo Entertainment, Reliance Entertainment, Chislehurst Entertainment
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis
